=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
1992.04.14 
Sydney, New South Wales
Australia,State Theatre

FLAC files  labelled "Les Kokay Australia 92-3"

CD1

1 New Morning 2 When I Paint My Masterpiece 3 Everything Is Broken 4 Just Like A Woman 5 Tangled Up In Blue 6 Shelter From The Storm 7 If Not For You 8 Love Minus Zero - No Limit (acoustic) 9 Little Moses (acoustic) 10 Desolation Row (acoustic w band)

CD2

1 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic w band) 2 Cat's In The Well 3 Idiot Wind 4 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic w band) 5 Maggie's Farm 6 Absolutely Sweet Marie 7 All Along The Watchtower 8 The Lady Of Carlisle (acoustic) 


8, 9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
3-11, 13, 14, 16  Bob Dylan harmonica.
10, 11, 14  acoustic with the band.
5, 14  Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
7  unknown violin.
10, 11  Bucky Baxter (dobro or acoustic slide).

Notes.

Live debut of The Lady Of Carlisle and If Not For You!
Second "Desolation Row breakdown" (cf April 5).

BobTalk:
Thanks everybody! That's a song about love lost, this is one about love won! (after Tangled Up In Blue).
